'''Artzam Hathan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] who was a chief engineer at some point. Artzam Hathan was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for stealing design schematics and architectural layouts which he intended to sell. His bounty was for 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 credits dead, and was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He also had an accomplice called [[Alby Ermad]] who had a bounty on his head for the same crime.
